Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Dude! I heard the juiciest news just now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}You wanna hear it? 'Course you do![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Okay, here goes. And this is just between you and me, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Get this—so next month, I heard we have three fine-looking teachers coming in![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}After Emi— Uh, Ms. Kanou leaves, the faculty roster kinda loses its spark, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Ms. Toriumi has that weird secret, Ms. Ounishi is obsessed with medicine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}And Ms. Terauchi is like, going to India or somewhere...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}I mean, c'mon! Even our school nurse is a guy! Sure, guy nurses are out there, but we could do better than him![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}He's got some kinda anti-hooky agenda...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}...Speak of the devil, you don't look so good. You need to go see that devil-nurse?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}If that's the case, sorry dude, but you're on your own. I refuse to set foot in that so-called nurse's office.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}Oh, oh, and those new teachers are coming by today to check out the campus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}I'm thinking about hanging around the faculty office to scope 'em out. Wanna come?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}We got electives to choose next year, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}There you go again. Always the cool customer, aren't ya?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 18 0 0}But look—we got electives to choose next year, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 19 0 0}So we've gotta make sure we choose the right one, if you catch my drift.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 22 0 0}Sorry, man! I gotta split before she gets here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 25 0 0}She'll be coming here starting next month, so she's gonna swing by today and look around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 26 0 0}But I'm not gonna be her damn tour guide! I don't wanna be seen leading her around by the hand everywhere![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 27 0 0}I wish I had an older sister instead...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 28 0 0}Well anyway, I'm gonna jet. Later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 29 0 0}Yeah, I know. But if I run into her she just won't shut up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 30 0 0}It's my little sis. She'll be coming here next month, so she's gonna swing by today to look around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 31 0 0}But I am not gonna be her damn tour guide! I don't wanna be seen leading her around by the hand everywhere![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 32 0 0}I wish I had an older sister instead...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 33 0 0}Well anyway, I'm gonna jet. Later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 35 0 0}I really wanted to see those new teachers. I don't want to wait a whole month...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 36 0 0}Oh, yeah. When my sis enrolls next month, I'll introduce you two.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 37 0 0}She loves to yap, but maybe she'll shut up if you're around. Just help me, for the love of god.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 38 0 0}Wait, but then you'd become my brother-in-law one day, huh? Hm, I don't know about that.[n]{f 1 1}
